name: Concept Ledger
description: Maintains a concept ledger that tracks term clarity across conversations. Automatically detects naming chaos, definition drift, metaphor overreach, and concept collisions. Helps concepts evolve from Vague to Frozen through natural conversation.
author: Concept Ledger Team

projectId.description: Optional project identifier for ledger isolation. Defaults to 'default' if not set.

autoIntervene.description: Whether the plugin should automatically intervene in the conversation when signals are detected. Defaults to true.

synonymThreshold.description: Jaro-Winkler similarity threshold for synonym detection. Defaults to 0.85.
